label: Subagent • live spawn persona digest
query: Spawn a persona and get back a compact digest.
notes: LIVE. Runs the host + TextSubagentKind against an auto-seeded spawnable persona named 'sparky', on the RUN model (model override), so the spawn text path is a real cross-model column. `seedSpawnablePersona` creates + allow-lists 'sparky' for the run and tears it down after, so it runs on any host. SKIPS only when the run model itself isn't ready (e.g. a remote provider with no key).

subagent.input: In one sentence, summarize what a bounded sub-agent is.
